creator: fbsd@www.zefox.net
text:
An attempt to compile graphics/gimp on a Pi4 using poudriere failed with
......

ld: error: ./.libs/librsvg-2.so: undefined reference to getauxval [--no-allow-shlib-undefined]
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)

The logfile can be seen at
http://www.zefox.net/~fbsd/rpi4/librsvg2-rust-2.50.3_5.log

Perhaps more curious, the poudriere session reported done,
rather than failed, after it finished.
